_comment: GitMD app version-update gate. Fetched on launch; compared to BuildConfig.VERSION_CODE. minSupportedVersionCode>current → forced update, latestVersionCode>current → soft notice. min=0 disables forcing. 404/garbage fails open. Spec: ymatsuza1128/github-markdown docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-13-version-update-gate-design.md

soft.ja: 新しいバージョンが利用できます。

forced.ja: ご利用を続けるにはアップデートが必要です。
forced.en: An update is required to continue.
